textByHash.dcfbe3f7426a12abd6e4198a038def2610aed0c9: This is the fight pit, TzHaar-Xil made it for their sport but many JalYt come here to fight too. If you are wanting to fight then enter the cage, you will be summoned when next round is ready to begin.
textByHash.7dd374d0c334b1d995b2b6d1a19c8ced8f5173ad: No rules, you use whatever you want. Last person standing wins and is declared champion, they stay in the pit for next fight.
textByHash.2c6413fb9f9db961a4adbb169554d0b8d3ed0ea1: You ask a lot of questions. Champion gets TokKul as reward, more fights the more TokKul they get.
textByHash.9694e1fdba042eaeb91fb62240725322190f623a: Before you ask, TokKul is like your Coins.
textByHash.48a4846480e02ddb7ba79cd70e81a4be166f5f08: Gold is like you JalYt, soft and easily broken, we use hard rock forged in fire like TzHaar!
textByHash.60ea8c8ed988a95e40290ab77c913a3e421f469d: That what you are... you tough and strong no?
textByHash.0cd94f3f5dcfab7dc0c3bf6fff8dc5bd110c59e6: Foolish JalYt, I am TzHaar-Mej, one of the mystics of this city.
textByHash.b6092bd03893b93fa754719bf13f08fd5101d71d: There are the mighty TzHaar-Ket who guard us, the swift TzHaar-Xil who hunt for our food, and the skilled TzHaar-Hur who craft our homes and tools.
textByHash.0e756222545ff1b2fb345c16b18fc1bc713746a8: What ever you say, crazy JalYt!
